title: Seedy Saplings
description: Changes the name and appearance of sapling item to seeds of their respective trees, as well as making recently placed saplings appear as sprouts!
body:
This resource pack features:

- New sprites for sapling items and immature saplings for all vanilla overworld trees
- New names for sapling items to reflect their changed textures
- A visual update for mangrove propagules, including a new sapling-like appearance for both mature and potted propagules

Mod support:

[No Man’s Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land) - [No Man’s Saplings](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-mans-saplings) by the amazing [JBCC](https://modrinth.com/user/JBCC)!
